case_title: FUENTES, JACOBO VS CASTANEDA, BILL DBA NOVUS PAINTING CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUENTES, JACOBO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, BILL DBA NOVUS PAINTING CO. $230.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $252.00, PROOF OF SERVICE IS 5/9/03.
